docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF ORDER STRIKING FILING DUE TO INVALID CHECK MAILED TO ROY MILLER ON 11/13/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,105.50 FILED BY ESPINOZA, HIPOLITO AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, ROY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. FILING IS VOID DUE TO BAD CHECK. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE; FILING IS VOID (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS > 5000 STRICKEN BY COURT ORDER FOR FAILURE TO REDEEM INVALID CHECK FOR TRANSACTION R2818725S001; NO FURTHER FILINGS ON PART OF ESPINOZA, HIPOLITO
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION R2818725S001 FOR SMALL CLAIMS > 5000
